channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: More than 3 million college students are raising kids. Most won't graduate
item.description: Only 18% of student parents earn a degree within six years. Addressing this is not charity—it is the most direct solution to the talent shortage.

item.title: Anthropic's Alibaba fight raises a trillion-dollar question for IPO: How defensible is a frontier AI moat against China with Washington's toolbox?
item.description: The dispute over Claude could challenge Anthropic's valuation by revealing the difficulty of protecting frontier AI models after extraction.

item.title: Even Apple supply chain maestro Tim Cook couldn't dodge the memory chip 'RAM-ageddon' crisis. Here's why PC prices are soaring this summer
item.description: Apple, Microsoft, HP, and other device manufacturers are forced to choose between sacrificing sales or profit.

item.title: How Paris Saint-Germain borrowed from Barcelona and the Yankees to build a global brand
item.description: Barcelona FC calls itself "more than a club," but at PSG's La Maison in New York, the motto is "Here, it's Paris."
